title: Foo Bar Paginated Analytics API
description: Build a paginated analytics API that serves large result sets from ClickHouse with cursor-based or offset pagination. Support page size and consistent ordering.

tasks.description: Implement an HTTP API with /api/events that supports limit, offset (or cursor), and returns total count.

infrastructure.description: ClickHouse seeded with 10k+ events. Build an API on port 3000 with pagination support.
